133.content:
A top-secret device is found by one of our characters. It seems to have been packed for secure transport, along with instructions on its use. It is a small metallic cylindrical device, like a laser pointer, labeled "Super Genital Swapper," with "SGS" engraved along its side.

According to the included instructions, it is a device designed for manipulating human relationships for the purposes of corporate espionage, among other uses. The way it does this is by swapping genitals between any two people that it gets pointed at in succession.

However, swapping genitals is only the physical "anchor" for the real purpose, which is to swap relationships between people. Any relationship with a bearing on the swapped genitals is included in the swap, meaning romantic and sexual relationships, as well as parentage. For example, if the mother of a child is swapped with someone else, that person becomes the mother of her children. But if her children are swapped with anyone, they are still her children because their genitals are not directly relevant to their relationship.

Sexual preference is also swapped with the genitals in order to facilitate the swapped relationships but will still include the original romantic relationships, if any are present. For instance, a heterosexual couple swapped with each other will swap general sexual preferences, but will remain attracted to each other even though their partners still look like their original selves (apart from their privates).

Oddly, apart from the genitals, preferences, and relationships, everything else remains unswapped. Clothing, identity, gender, names, fashion sense, etc., all remain completely untouched. As such, in theory it is feasible for a man with a male identity and pronouns to be considered someone's mother, if swapped with a mother. Or a woman can be considered someone's boyfriend, while still being considered a woman.

In addition, all targets are unaware of the swaps by default. The user of the device is always aware of all swaps that they cause, and they can make one or both targets aware of the swaps that they are subject to. However, a user of the device won't be aware of swaps made by others using the device, and targets made aware of their own swaps will not be aware of any swaps not involving themselves.

Swaps do not have a limited duration and will remain in place indefinitely, until swapped back. The device does not have a reset button; if swaps are to be reversed, they must be reversed manually by targeting both parties as before. However, the targets do not need to be in the same location to be swapped, and there is no time limit between selecting the first target and selecting the second target.

Who finds this strange device?

John the janitor walked down the aisle, nodding to Rose and David as he passed. The 42-year-old was in a good mood. It was his last day at work before he and his wife, Amanda, would be going for a short vacation to mark their 20th anniversary. He'd already arranged everything: a neighbor would watch the family cat, the kids (15-year-old Brendon and 13-year-old Melody) would be staying at his parents', and the rental flat overlooking the beach was booked for the week.

None of this was a secret, either. He'd been talking to everyone at work about it for weeks. He couldn't remember when last he and Amanda had had a proper vacation to themselves since the kids were in preschool. It was going to be a great week.

Or it would have been. Except that David was ready with the SGS, dying to test its abilities to alter reality. Rose was focusing on her work, and the moment John had passed, David snapped off two quick shots with the SGS. One aimed at Rose, the other at John.

Rose's knee-length black skirt gained a modest bulge at the crotch as John's privates grew in. However, she didn't react to this at all, still packing cans as if nothing had happened. John, too, didn't even break his stride as he gained Rose's vagina.

After John had left, David decided to strike up some conversation with Rose to test how his swap had altered reality.

"How is everything lately?" he asked, unprompted. "Wife, kids?"

Rose giggled. "Oh, I thought I'd talked your ear off about it already! Amanda and I are going on vacation!"

"I overheard a bit about that over lunch the other day, but you weren't talking to me," David lied glibly. "How did the arrangements go?"

"Got everything sorted," she bragged. "The flat's rented, the transportation's arranged. The kids will be staying at my mum's... well, obviously, since that's where I live. My mum's." She seemed momentarily confused, then went on: "So that part didn't need to be arranged, luckily."

"That is lucky," David agreed. "Damn girl, you're going to be husband of the year!"

"I'm going to feel like it, that's for sure! Amanda and I haven't had a real vacation since the kids were in the lower grades! Must have been... seven or eight years ago? But that can't be right... I was ten years old then..." Rose's brow furled in consternation.

"Crap," thought David. "She's gonna notice!"

Suddenly though, Rose shrugged and seemed to dismiss it from her mind. "Oh well. Some time ago, at any rate. I'm not good at math! The kids are a bit mad about not getting to go along. They've both been a bit sulky over the past few days. Teenagers!" she laughed. Then paused. "Like me... I'm a teenager, I'm eighteen..."

Again, the wheels seemed to turn in Rose's head as the contradictions of the new reality became obvious. David was getting worried again, but then Rose chortled. "Ha! I'm never like that, even though I'm a teenager too, so they really have no excuses! The missus and me deserve a break, the brats can get over it!"

David nodded along and let her chat. Every now and then, the clashing details of her new life as a teenage girl living with her mum, but also the husband to a forty-year-old wife, and with kids almost as old as herself, would cause her to stop, trying to work out how it all fit together. But the magic (or super-advanced science, perhaps) of the SGS would always assert itself, and she'd dismiss the contradiction with a shrug and a quip appropriate to either a teen girl or the husband to a middle-aged woman... or some strange mix of both.

Meanwhile, John the janitor had reached the locker room and deposited his personal effects, and was now on his way to the closet housing the cleaning supplies, ready to start his job. He was, however, not in the very best mood. He'd been feeling lonely lately. His flat was rather too large for a single man, living as he did alone with his cat. He didn't even quite remember why he'd rented such a large flat in the first place. It's not as if he needed the extra bedrooms. And it had been at least two years since he'd had a boyfriend.

Right then, he saw two customers walking by, clearly in love, whispering to each other and giggling. John sighed, lamenting his fate. Was it really too much for a middle-aged fella like himself to ask, to be someone's girlfriend?

"I don't believe it." Emma said as she sat her desk reading her e-mails.

"What's up luv?" Liz her assistant manager asked as she looked up from her screen.

They both now shared the small manager's office since Liz had been promoted.

"You remember that staff diversity survey we did a few weeks back?"

"Yeah, more pointless paperwork." Liz said sighing.

"I just got the report back from the area manager. We scored very well in most areas..."

"But?" Liz asked.

"There was one area we did really, really badly. The average age of our staff is the lowest in the whole of the country."

"I suppose one store had to be the lowest. I like to think we have a young, vibrant workforce."

"Me too but apparently the high ups think we are giving out the wrong message. Wilko doesn't want accusations of being an employer who discriminates because of age. We've to focus our recruiting towards a wider age range in the future." Emma explained.

"It's strange, most of our workers have been here for donkeys too. You think the average age would be creeping up. It's not our fault older people don't want to work retail. It can be physically demanding especially in a hardware store where a lot of the stock is quite heavy."

"I know Liz. I know the advantages of older employees too." She closed the e-mail software. "We don't have the budget for more employees right now. We don't even have that many Christmas temps to take on that other retailers do."

"There is training too. Most of our existing employees have been here so long they are worth two temps, who are only here for a few weeks and don't have time to learn all the jobs properly."

Emma found her imagination wandering off as she thought about the problem. "What we'd want is somehow to be able to swap the minds of our staff into older bodies. That would get the average age up."

"Or get older experienced people, into younger bodies. Surely mental age counts instead of physical age. Everyone keeps saying 'It's just a number' after all." Liz said with a grin.

Emma looked up to the ceiling. "I wish we could do all that." She brought her head back down again. "Oh well enough for fantasy land. Back to the grind." She opened up the Solitaire program on her computer.

Steven seemed puzzled. “What are you on about? Did you not hear that I’m now stuck like this?!”

Liz was on the same thought track as Emma and quickly replied, “Yes, we heard that Steven and, though we offer you our deepest condolences, maybe this can actually lead to more pros for the branch than cons! Listen, corporate are starting to get on our backs. Apparently our workforce looks a bit too fresh-faced in their eyes and they’re worried that Rotherham’s showing biases towards younger people in the selection process. These earrings,” she said, lifting them in front of Steven’s bespectacled eyes, “May just be exactly what we need to prove them wrong!”

A few moments of silence passed, no-one inside the room saying anything at all. Then suddenly Steven burst out howling, slapping his knees and snorting in a cute way that would’ve sounded obnoxious back in his old body. He looked towards Liz and then onto Emma, both of their expressions rigid and stone-cold. “C’mon guys, you can’t honestly expect me to say that’s a good plan! Those stupid things don’t even work anymore and when they did, they screwed me over! I’ve still got my old crappy eyes right from before I swapped over! Even afterwards I must’ve put those damn earrings on and taken them off a dozen times!”

“Well you didn’t try it with someone else, did you? You might not be able to swap back to your old body anymore.”

Steven groaned as the realisation hit him. He trudged over to the desk and sat on the edge, splaying his legs out in a decidedly unladylike manner. “Even if you were to try an idea as stupid as that,” he whined, “How would you get anyone agree to give up their youth just for a stupid reason like this? There’s only one pair of these things so you’ll have to do all the swaps one at a time. It’s not feasible.”

Emma giggled as she took the golden earrings from Liz and juggled them inside her palm. “Don’t you worry your pretty little head, Stevie,” she laughed. “I can be very persuasive when I want to be.
1341.title: There is an unexpected knock at the door.

choices: Emma figures out a way to use the earrings to her immediate advantage
13415.content:
"First though we need to figure out how these things work." Emma said while she held up the earrings.

"I think that's kind of obvious." Steven said as he pointed at his new female body. "They make people swap bodies or at least they did before they stopped working."

Emma shook her head. "No, I think there is more to it than that. You didn't swap eyes and you got her accent. Why didn't that woman you swapped with, accuse you of stealing her body?" Steven shrugged. "I think we need to experiment." She opened the desk drawer and pulled out the notepad she usually carried when making her rounds. "I'll take notes." She looked over at Liz. "We'll need another person to swap with."

Liz leaned over towards the PA intercom. "Who did you have in mind Emma?" She asked. Emma smiled.

"Actually I was thinking of you, luv."

"Me?" Liz asked somewhat surprised. "What if I get stuck in Steven's body? What will Eric think when I tell him?" She was worried about her husband's reaction. Emma took another look at Steven's body.

"Oh I don't think he'd complain." She turned back to Liz. "Do you?" Liz looked at Steven herself.

"Well the boobs are a bit smaller but I don't think he'd have a problem with anything else on that body." She winked at Emma.

Steven stood up. "Who says I want to be in Liz's body?" He asked Emma. Before Emma could respond Liz butted in.

"What's wrong with my body? You'd still be younger than you were as a man." She poked one of his breasts with her finger. "Just remember, I've got three years on you sunshine." Steven scowled at her silently.

"Good," Said Emma whilst clasping her hands, "Now we've got that sorted out. Lets see if we can reproduce what happened originally." She unclasped her hands and handed an earring to Steven. "Put that on." Steven put it in his ear. She walked over to Liz who was taking her own earring out. "Okay Liz. You know what to do."

She handed Liz the earring. Liz was about to put it on when Emma stopped her. "Wait a second till I get my notepad." She leaned over to grab it.

"Hurry up Emma, for some reason, I really, really want to put this on." Liz was having to use all her willpower to stop herself.

"Hmm, just like Steven. Okay luv stop resisting." She started scribbling down notes. Liz put the earring on and everything in the office went a little fuzzy for a few seconds.

Liz looked at her hand and saw the other earring but it wasn't actually her hand. It was the hand of the young woman Steven had swapped with.

"Liz why did you just give Steven the earring?" Emma asked while leaning over her pad.

"I didn't, he did. We've swapped." Liz said with a slight Polish accent. She looked at Steven again. "And he's put his glasses on my head."

Emma and Steven in Liz's body, looked at Liz somewhat confused.

"That doesn't make sense." Emma said looking at both of them. "You are still in your own body Liz. Steven is in the body he got earlier."

"Yeah, it didn't work. I'm still stuck as this woman with these huge tits." Steven said looking down at Liz's large breasts while grabbing them.

Liz was getting frustrated. "Those are my tits, I mean breasts." Emma shook her head.

"Liz, luv we've worked together for years, I know what you look like." Liz was about to tell her Emma she was wrong again when she worked out what had happened.

"Your memories have changed." Liz told them. They both looked at her sceptically. "When Steven swapped at the car boot sale. That woman must have had her memories changed so she though Steven's body was her own. That's why she didn't accuse him of stealing her body." Emma scratched her head.

"Which would mean, the person who puts the earring on second remembers but the first person doesn't." Emma said thinking it out. She leaned over and noted the discovery down.

"But that doesn't make sense either." Steven said as he put his hand on his hip.

"Why not?" Asked Liz in the young sexy body.

"If the earrings change our memories, how come you didn't recognise me when I turned up in this body," he thought about it for a few seconds then pointed at Liz, "that body I mean. This is bloody confusing."

"You're telling me, I'm the only one that remembers it right." Liz said as she sat her body back on the desk. She kept her legs together unlike Steven.

"I see what err, Steven is saying. Even though I find it hard to believe, that body was a stranger to us." Emma said.

"I see another problem." Liz said.

"What's that?" Emma asked.

"Our ages. If people's memories change, then I imagine the records will too and I'll still be thirty eight. It won't make any difference to the average age of the workers in the shop."

"I thought you were about twenty five?" Steven asked Liz, convinced her current body was her original.

"Oh the age goes with the body. That does help then." Liz said. She turned to Emma. "You better write that down Emma."

Emma wrote that down. "So how old are you Steven?" She asked.

"I'm forty one. I don't know how old this body is, probably about the same, maybe a bit older." He said as he examined the back of his hands.

"Cheeky bugger, I just told you it's thirty eight because that's what I was before we swapped." An annoyed Liz told him as she stood back up again.

Emma had the top of the pen in her mouth as she thought about it. "Again Steven should think he's thirty eight but he still remembers being forty one. There must be something else we're missing." They all thought about it silently.

"I've got it!" Liz practically shouted. She put both earrings on. Everything seemed to go fuzzy again. "I remember Steven said he put the earrings on to try and change back. Did it work?"

"You've got my body now. We must have swapped again." He thought about it for a second moving his eyes from side to side. "No we haven't, have we?" Liz shook her head.

"You are just remembering the swap properly now." Liz said.

"So who is who?" A confused Emma asked.

"I'm Liz." Liz said from the young body. "Your memories aren't affected any more. I've swapped with Steven and you remember our original bodies."

"Yes, Steven has your body. Okay so that's what happens when the second person puts on the earrings, so what happens when the first person puts them on?" Liz took off the earrings and handed them to Steven. He put them in his ears.

"Has anything happened?" Steven asked.

"Not that I can tell." Emma said.

"Me neither." Liz confirmed.

"Typical." Steven said as he removed them. "They never seem to do anything when I wear them."

"Hang on." Liz told him as she moved her sexy body towards him. "We've cleared out everyone's false memories, so maybe it does something else if the first person wears them before the second."

Emma nodded. "You'll have to swap back to find out."

"If we can." Steven said somewhat dejectedly. He handed Liz an earring. She put it in her ear. "Well here's hoping." Steven said as he put on the earring. Everything went fuzzy. Steven found the earring in his hand. He was back in his young sexy female twenty five year old body again. His glasses were back on his nose. After the previous swap he knew he was the person with the correct memories. He turned to Emma. "Let me guess. You think we haven't swapped?"

"Liz?" Emma asked. Steven shook his head. "Steven. That makes sense you were swapped before but now you must be back in your original bodies even if I remember that body as being Liz's"

"Okay." Steven said. "Liz was the first person to put on the earring, so she needs to put them on." He gave them to her and she put them on. Everything went fuzzy again.

"It just did what it did the last time." I remember I'm back in my original body.

"You are not." Emma told her. "As far as I remember that is Steven's body."

"Okay. It only affects me." Said Liz as she handed the earrings back to Steven. "Put them back on." Steven nodded. He put them back on and once again everything went a little fuzzy.

"Right, so you are back in your original bodies?" Emma asked. Both Liz and Steven nodded.

Steven said "I can't believe I'm thinking of this as my original body. I was a man. It seems like such a distant memory."

"Oh don't be so melodramatic Steven." Liz told him as she rubbed his shoulder. "You're a pioneer. The first of many people who'll be getting swapped around here shortly."

Emma finished writing her notes. "I think I've got it all worked out. If one person each puts on an earring, they swap bodies mostly. The eyes stay with the mind they belong to. The first person to put on the earring and everyone else thinks there hasn't been a swap and their memories are adjusted. The first person gives their earring to the second person but doesn't remember doing it. The body's age seems to go with the body. The mind seems to think it is the age of the body. That could get weird if there is a big age difference."

"It's going to help us massively with the staffing issue though." Liz interjected. Emma nodded.

"Only the second person is unaffected by the change in memory. If the first person puts on both earrings they are the only person made aware of the swap. If the second person puts on both then everyone becomes aware. I think that's about it."

"Now what?" Steven asked Liz.

"Now, you are going to get changed into a company uniform. Don't think swapping bodies is going to allow you to get away with skiving off work."
13415.title: Something else happens (Reader’s Choice)

choices: Have a look at what else is going on in the store
There is the sound of approaching sirens
134151.content:
Liz disappeared out the office with Steven, leaving Emma on her own.

Normally she'd be back on her computer. Right now she was far too excited to play Solitaire. She wanted to make use of the earrings but she wasn't sure how.

She decided she needed a brief distraction and chose to touch up her make up. She opened her desk drawer and pulled out the vanity mirror she kept in there. As she applied the make up, she looked at her face. She didn't think of herself as old yet but she knew she wasn't young any more. She looked at the crows feet at the corners of her eyes and the few wrinkles around her mouth.

She ran her fingers through her dark hair. She had to dye it more regularly now to stop the grey creeping through. She thought about how much longer it took to get over an illness or a hangover for that matter. Emma suspected she had started to go through the early stages of the menopause, having the occasional hot flush. She felt like time was slowly catching up with her. "It would be great to be a young again." She said out loud to herself.

A wicked idea suddenly popped into her head. She put the mirror away. Emma pulled out her mobile phone and called her daughter Alice.

Alice was currently at home in the living room, sitting on the sofa, watching television and eating her breakfast. Her phone began ringing. "Hi mum. What's up?" She asked as she answered it.

"I was wondering if you could pop by work luv. I may have a lead on a job for you." Alice was currently 'looking' for a temporary summer job before starting university. She yawned in response.

"Yeah, I'll be there in couple of hours." She said sleepily.

"No, you need to come as soon as possible. The interview is today. I just found out about it." Emma lied.

"Oh okay."

"You should wear that outfit I got you."

"What the mini-me one?" She laughed at the derisory term she used for the outfit that resembled her mother's work clothes. It consisted of black trousers and a white blouse.

"It's professional." Emma insisted. Maybe it was a step too far she thought. She was starting to have doubts about this plan.

"Not exactly trendy though. I'm kind of in the middle of something right now anyway."

"I'm sure you can afford to miss an episode of This Morning." Emma told her referring to the daytime talk show.

"It's Homes Under the Hammer actually."

Emma sighed. "The point is you're wasting your whole day away doing nothing."

"It's just gone ten o'clock. That's hardly the whole day."

"And I've been up since seven." Emma really didn't want to get angry with her. The poor girl was just relaxing after finishing school. She couldn't blame her for that. Emma was starting to reconsider her whole plan. She calmed herself down. "There's more to life to sitting in your PJs, watching daytime TV and eating cornflakes."

"I'm not," Alice insisted, "it's Weetabix." This instantly angered Emma again.

"You know the Weetabix is mine." Emma was annoyed by the cheek of the girl, stealing it. This decided it for Emma. Her plan was going ahead.

"I fancied a change." Me as well, Emma thought.

"Well if you got a job you could buy your own bloody Weetabix." Emma told her in the well established tone of a parent. Alice mimicked her nagging silently. "And stop making faces." She told her after using her parental telepathy.

"Yes mum." Alice said with only the slightest hint of sarcasm. "I'll get the bus, should be there in about an hour or so."

"This is urgent. Get a taxi and wear the outfit." Emma changed to a sweet tone. "See you soon, luv you." She hung up.

---

Alice stepped into the manager's office just under an hour later. Emma who had been waiting impatiently, closed her computer and stood up to talk to her.

"Hi Honey." Emma said in a friendly manner as she looked at Alice in her business suit.

"I hope this job is worth it. I feel silly in these clothes." Alice told her as she looked at their nearly identical outfits. Emma frowned.

"Bad news I'm afraid. They already hired someone. One of their temps it seems."

"Oh great. All this effort for nothing." Alice said as she put down her hand bag on the desk. "You could have phoned. Where was it for?"

Emma thought of something on the spot. "Our store in Barnsley." Emma said in that unique way all people from Yorkshire say Barnsley.

"Sounds like I dodged a bullet. I'm glad I'm not going to Barnsley every day. Well, if I hurry back I might catch Bargain Hunt."

"No! Don't run off." Emma said pulling out the earrings. "I picked these up today. They are antiques. I thought you could tell me what you thought." She handed one to Alice. She looked at it.

"They are kind of pretty, I guess."

"Model it for me."

"My piercings have sealed up. I need them redone."

"I know luv. I think these earrings have a special attachment. Just try please." Emma insisted. Alice shrugged with her eyebrows and put the earring to her ear.

"Oh, wow. It does attach." Emma instantly felt the compulsion to put on the other earring. She didn't resist. Everything went fuzzy.

Emma looked down and saw the other earring in her hand. She looked up and found herself facing herself. It was such a strange sensation she could barely keep a straight face.

"What's so funny, mum?" Alice asked in Emma's middle-aged voice. She picked up her own handbag. Emma noticed, finding it interesting that the hand bag's ownership didn't swap.

"Nothing." She lied, in her new voice. She grabbed her own handbag and pulled out her purse. She noticed Alice's nails were unvarnished. She reached in and pulled out a twenty pound note. "This is for your taxis. Get yourself some lunch with change." Alice took the note.

"Thanks mum." Alice responded.

Emma sat down behind the desk and opened her computer. She looked up. "I'll see you later." She returned to looking at her computer indicating that the conversation was over. Alice turned round and walked out closing the door behind her.

Emma leaned back on her seat, in her new young body and smiled.
134151.title: Emma figures out a way to use the earrings to h...

choices: Stefania comes into the office.  She is not happy.
1341511.content:
"Time for a bit of an appraisal, I think." Emma said out loud. It still made her feel giddy talking in this new voice. She pulled her mirror out her drawer again. She spent several minutes examining her new face. She was familiar with it of course but she'd never seen it from this angle before.

She noted Alice's facial resemblance to her own. It seemed even more noticeable now. Many family members had commented on how much Alice looked like a younger version of her mother. In fact she clearly remembered someone using the word clone as a joke. That suited Emma just fine. If you were to get a younger body and you were generally happy with your looks surely you'd want some familiarity.

She found it quite difficult to tell if she had her original eyes. Like her facial features Alice's eye colour was similar to Emma's. On closer inspection though, she was fairly sure she had kept the originals. They just looked 'older'.

She spent quite a bit of time making faces in the mirror. She finished by pursing her lips several times and giggling each time.

She put the mirror down and ran her fingers through her hair. It felt silkier than her own. Emma was also aware it hadn't been damaged by years of dye treatment. In fact she couldn't remember Alice ever dying it. She didn't like her hair down though, especially when she was working. She reached into the drawer and pulled out her spare scrunchy. She quickly styled the hair into a pony tail. "Much better." She said to nobody again.

As she put the mirror back in the drawer, she spotted her handbag. As that hadn't swapped with Alice she was curious about the contents. She opened it. It seemed to be all her own stuff. She opened her purse and pulled out her driving licence. There on the pink piece of plastic was a photo of Alice with Emma's name next to it. She looked at the Date of Birth. It was the same as Alice's. As far as the world knew Emma was a few weeks shy of her eighteenth birthday.

She was even more surprised when she saw the date the licence was issued. It was eight years ago. "How the hell does that work?" Emma asked out loud. She wondered how a nine year old girl got a driving licence. It seemed the earrings could change more than just memories.

She put the licence away. She knew she had to investigate the age thing more but for now she wanted to inspect the rest of her body. She pulled out the chair and stood up. She would have preferred a full length mirror but she could kind of see a reflection in the office window.

She didn't mind posing in front of it. The old Tesco across the river had been demolished a few years ago. All that was visible was the Wilko store roof. She couldn't resist the urge to feel her own breasts. She cupped them in her hands. She was a little disappointed Alice's seemed a little smaller than her own. She wasn't complaining though, she'd gained thirty years in age.

As she moved around she felt a different sensation. It felt like her underwear was digging into her ass crack. She slipped her fingers down to free the rogue knickers when she suddenly stopped. "Am I wearing a thong?" She asked out loud after feeling the fabric. She had to see. She quickly pulled her hand out and unfastened the trousers letting them drop to her knees.

They did indeed reveal a very skimpy teal coloured thong underneath them. She couldn't recall ever seeing thongs in Alice's laundry. She would have had something to say about it, if she had. That wasn't her only surprise. There on her hip just below her non-existent waistband was a tattoo. It was a small red heart. "When the hell did she get that?" She asked both amazed and annoyed.

As much as she felt she had a certain level of control in Alice's life, she was quickly learning there was a lot more going on than she was aware of. She slowly pulled the trousers back up.

She finished fastening them, just as Liz walked in the door Emma had forgotten to lock. She silently cursed herself for getting distracted by the contents of her trousers. She put it out of her mind for now and returned to manager mode. "You all right Emma?" Liz asked as she fiddled with the printer.

"Oh yes. How are you getting on with Steven?" She asked.

"It's Stefania now. I came up to print his, I mean her, name badge." She said as she loaded the name badge blank into the printer.

"Did you get her sorted out with a new uniform?" Emma asked.

"Eventually," Liz sighed. "She is a total diva. She didn't like any of the underwear I got her. Reckoned the bras chaffed her too much. My bras chafe too but you don't hear me complaining about it."

"Well this is what happens when a man is in a woman's body. They complain about all the stuff we take for granted."

"I know." Liz said as she opened the badge template on her computer. "Anyway she ended up dressed. Our uniforms aren't designed for ladies with his proportions. He's quite the sight."

"I can imagine. So how are you explaining our new staff member?" Emma asked.

"Oh we're telling everyone Steven has gone on a course. We're going to say Stefania's a trainee assistant supervisor who is getting sent to a different store." Liz explained.

"Not Parkgate or Meadowhall?" A worried Emma asked, referring to the two nearby stores in the out-of-town shopping centres. "The staff know loads of people from there. They'll find out." Liz shook her head.

"Don't panic. Barnsley." She said as the badge started printing.

Emma sighed with relief. "Thank goodness. Our staff wouldn't know anyone from there."

"Who would want to?" Liz asked rhetorically with a chuckle.

Emma was amazed that she could chat to Liz in Alice's body like normal and she was completely unaware. She was quickly getting used to experiencing a swap first hand. She decided to put the memory alteration to the test. "How many years have we worked together now Liz?" She asked.

Liz had a thoughtful look on her face as she stood up. "What's it been? Three or four years since you started here." She said as she walked over to the printer.

Emma nodded. "Yeah four years I think. I was pretty young back then."

"You sure were. I remember you could barely fill a bra when you started." She said laughing. Emma remembered Alice had been fairly flat chested till she got a growth spurt about three years ago.

"I still drove to work though, right?" Emma asked. Liz stopped and stared at her. Liz eyed her manager suspiciously. "Of course." She said slowly. Emma nodded.

"You've used them, haven't you?" Liz asked.

"What?"

"The earrings, you've used them. Standing there grinning and asking me strange questions." Liz correctly deduced.

"Maybe." Emma said grinning even more.

"I knew it. Oh my God, did you swap with me? Is that my body?" Liz asked.

"No."

"You would say that."

"Liz, you're being paranoid love." Emma reassured her. Liz still unconsciously stood away from her. "Look I'll prove it." Emma picked up the earrings and handed them to Liz. "Put these on and you'll know." Liz slipped them on her ears and the room went fuzzy.

"Alice?" Liz asked.
1341511.title: Continue with Emma

choices: Emma waits for Liz to leave so she can explore more.
Follow Liz so she can organise a meeting for picking swap candidates
Stefania comes in begging for a swap
13415111.content:
"No it's still Emma." Emma told her.

"I thought I saw Alice leaving the store earlier. Are you telling me I saw her in your body?" Liz asked. Emma nodded.

"You should still see me as Emma though. We didn't swap, so how come the earrings are making you see the truth?" Emma asked a little confused.

"I guess we assumed a few things when we were doing the experiments with Stefania. It looks like anyone who wears the earrings sees the truth. The only person it seems to make a difference with, is the person who put on the second earring. They cancel it out for everyone." Liz deduced from what she'd seen.

"We'll have to take more care with who gets to wear them after a swap." Emma said.

"Why did you swap with Alice anyway?" Liz wondered.

"We are expecting the staff to swap for the good of the store. I wouldn't expect them to do anything I wasn't prepared to do myself." Emma said like a General talking about their troops.

"Why didn't you pick someone from the store? Is what I meant Emma."

"Well err, I thought it made sense to swap with a family member first. I thought it would be easier. This way I don't have to be an interloper in a family of strangers. I wouldn't have to locate the other person's house either." Emma felt she'd covered up her own selfish motivations pretty well with her explanation. She certainly wasn't going to mention the stolen Weetabix.

Liz nodded but still felt a bit cynical about Emma swapping with her teenage daughter. "So you aren't planning on swapping out before the end of shift then?"

"I don't want to call her in here again today. The last thing I want is for her to get suspicious. I can do it when I get home." She could see Liz wasn't convinced. "It's been a learning experience too. I've already found out..." She paused.

"What?" Liz asked now curious. Emma lowered her voice and leaned closer.

"Alice has got a tattoo." She leaned back and made a 'what do you think of that?' expression on her face.

Liz was a little surprised. "She's managed to keep that hidden from you?" Emma nodded. "Is it a boy's name or something juicy like that?" Liz asked.

"It's a heart on her hip, it must be nearly an inch across." Emma said trying to impress her assistant manager.

"That's hardly anything these days. Courtney's got a fire breathing dragon right across her..."

"Okay I don't need to know." After Liz's revelation, Emma considered she was a bit more out of touch with young people than she liked to admit. "That's the only one I've found so far anyway." She was feeling a little jealous now that she knew tattoos were commonplace.

"You mean, you are going to check? Don't you think that's, you know, a bit of an invasion of privacy."

"Changed days luv. Do you think Stefania cares about the privacy of the body she's in?"

"I suppose you're right. If someone's mind is in it, realistically the body belongs to them." Emma was pleased, Liz had came round to her way of thinking. "Speaking of you and Stefania, I thought the whole point of this was to increase the age of our staff."

"Yeah." Emma could see where this was going.

"We have forty members of staff here. You've lost, what thirty years," Emma nodded, "and Stefania has lost about fifteen. That's forty five years roughly. Between the pair of you, you've managed to knock the average of the staff down by over a year. We are going in the wrong direction."

"Wow, aiming to go work for corporate one day Liz?" Emma asked sarcastically. "You sure seem bothered by following their directives to the letter."

"No, I just don't want us to get into any more bother from them."

"As a manager I probably don't count and even if I do, I'm going to class this," she pointed at her body with both hands, "as a managerial perk." She could see the looks Liz was giving her. "We'll get it sorted out eventually. Don't get you knickers in a twist luv." Emma said as she sat back down at her desk.

"I don't know. I'm getting cold feet about all this now." Liz said worried about the way it was effecting Emma.

"You should try it. Swap with Courtney. At least you'll be doing something productive with her body. Look at Alice, if I hadn't swapped with her she'd be wasting her days away watching TV and stealing my Weetabix. Now her body is actually doing something constructive with its youth." Emma said as she started up Solitaire on the computer.
13415111.title: Continue with Emma and Liz.

choices: Stefania tries to get someone to swap
There is an unexpected knock on the bathroom door.
134151111.content:
Once she was sure Liz was away, Emma closed her computer down. She opened the drawer again to grab her vanity mirror. "You know I really should check this body for any more hidden surprises." She said to herself. She twisted her head in the other direction. "That sure sounds like a good idea Emma." She giggled as she stood up.

Luckily for Emma there was a small bathroom attached to the manager's office. The managers weren't expected to use the regular toilets. It was yet another symbol of the 'them and us' mentality of employers when it came to staff, in many large workplaces throughout the nation.

As a managerial perk though, it wasn't particularly impressive. It was tidy enough, John cleaned it personally, not that it required much cleaning as it was only used by two people in a shop with forty workers. It was pretty small though. It's contents were unimpressive, there was just a toilet and a hand basin with a mirror above it. It was usually illuminated by a small skylight covered in bird droppings. Luckily someone had the good sense to install an extractor fan near the skylight, so nasty aromas weren't an issue in the manager's office.

Emma looked into the tiny dingy room. She would never describe it as impressive but it was just about suitable for what she had in mind. She shut the door and locked it with a well worn snib. After putting the vanity mirror on the toilet cistern, she started undoing the buttons on her blouse.

---

On her way down the stairs Liz started to reconsider Emma's suggestion. She originally hadn't been keen on the idea of swapping with Courtney. It certainly wouldn't help with the staffing issue but why shouldn't she get herself a younger body too? It wasn't as big an age change for her either. Just fifteen years rather than thirty. The apparent issues Emma had with the generation gap wouldn't be as big a problem for her. The pros seem to add up in Liz's mind while the cons were rationalised away. She giggled at the thought of going all the way with the swap. Let Courtney be the one to deal with looking after her little brother. Liz would be free.

She was interrupted when she reached the bottom of the stairs. She could see a figure skulking in the shadows in a dark corner of the corridor. Liz mentally reminded herself to mention the broken light bulb to John yet again.

Letting her eyes adjust to the darker area she could make out the silhouette of the skulker. Actually it was pretty easy to recognise. "Stefania what are you doing?" Liz asked.

"How did you know it was me?" Stefania asked back, stepping out of the shadows.

"Seriously?" Liz asked as she glanced at Stefania's breasts. Stefania just stared back. "Apart from me you've got the biggest boobs in the store."

"Oh I see." She seemed a little distracted.

It made me happy." She put her hands on her own chest. Getting upset again, she said "Now thanks to the swap, I'm back to square one. I'm a man. A big ugly man."

"Don't worry about it. It was just a little experiment on my part. You can get back to work now," Liz said. Almost as an afterthought she said, "You can take an extra five minutes on your break for helping." She kept trying to secretly examine Kiran's body searching for clues to identify it.

"Thanks," Kiran said as she went back to work.

As she walked away Liz noticed Kiran was out of uniform. She was wearing a man's business suit for some reason. Liz smiled, she did swap with Kyle, she thought. It was the only logical explanation. Liz also knew there was much logic when it came to the earrings, they had some strange quirks.

Kiran walked past the attractive Courtney or rather Courtney in Stefania's body. She couldn't resist looking over her impressive figure. Kiran felt a little movement in her underwear. Thanks to a glitch in the earrings she had a bit more of Kyle than just his body, from the swap.

I'm straight, why am I enjoying looking at a woman? Kiran wondered, as she felt her cock tingle a little. She tried to put the idea out her head as she passed by her supervisor.

A few minutes later Luke emerged from the staff door. He nodded to Liz and went back to work himself. Emma must have sent him down, she assumed. If that was actually Luke, an increasingly paranoid Liz thought. Without wearing the earrings, she wouldn't know who anyone really was.

Why hasn't Kyle came with him, Liz wondered.

Her questions were soon answered when Emma and Kyle came through the staff door. Liz's theory about the swap was confirmed, Emma's tiny husband was wearing a shop uniform although he had tried to cover it up with his overcoat. He looked very reluctant to come out on to the shop floor.

"Something wrong?" Liz asked Emma as she walked up to her.

"I think Kyle's got a dose of food poisoning. Probably ate a dodgy sandwich or something," she said before turning towards him. Kyle looked back at her nervously, then an expression of comprehension appeared on his feminine face. He started to rub his belly as he groaned, pretending to be sick. Emma shook her head slightly at his bad acting.

"Oh," Liz said sounding concerned, "I hope it's not too serious."

"If it hasn't cleared up in a couple of hours, I'll take him to the hospital," Emma lied, "I'm just going to give him a run home. I've redirected incoming calls to the help desk so you don't have to go up to the office," she said.

"Okay," Liz said. She was aware the shop was quite busy at the moment and it was probably for the best she was downstairs.

Emma leaned in closer. She handed Liz the magic earrings before she quietly said, "You better look after these, till I get back luv. I don't want to leave them lying about."

Liz nodded as she slipped them into her pocket. "I'll keep an eye on them."

"You don't have to wear them. I haven't done any more swaps," Emma reassured her.

Liz knew fine well she was lying.

The unusual couple walked off. Emma put her arm round Kyle's narrow shoulders. Liz watched them as they went through the shop doors heading in the direction of the car park.

Quickly Liz slipped on the earrings and everything went a little fuzzy. She glanced up the aisle to see 'Kyle' working there. She smiled seeing Kiran still in his suit, stacking shelves. "Just as I thought," Liz said smugly to herself as she put the earrings back in her pocket.

13415111121111111111215141.content:
Liz was walking around a quiet part of the shop when she heard the distinctive sound of a man crying. She spotted two full stock cages near each other. Looking carefully she could see a figure bent down in between them.

It was Rose in Liam's body having what looked like a full on meltdown. "What's wrong?" Liz asked as she approached.

"I can't handle this. I thought I could but it's too much. Being a man, it's just wrong," she managed to say between the tears.

Liz was surprised the girl's reaction. She had seemed so upbeat earlier. Liz realised Rose must have been putting a brave face on. "I suppose it does take a bit of getting used to," Liz admitted, fully aware she hadn't actually swapped with a man herself.

"Liam's not having these problems. He's walking around in my body like it's just a normal day for him," she said slowly. Her crying eased off a little.

"Liam doesn't give a crap about anyone else. He's also a bit older than you," Liz said. It struck her this poor girl was only eighteen, it might be a lot to cope with. She was also unaware of the other emotional burdens Rose was under. She felt herself feeling sorry for her but wasn't sure how to help.

Liz looked idly around the store when she spotted her friend Carly shopping for supplies for her salon. The attractive blonde was stylishly dressed in a fawn coloured top and skirt. On her feet were a pair of gold coloured heeled sandals. An idea popped into Liz's head. An idea that caused her to briefly battle with her conscience.

Liz turned back to Rose. "Would you be more comfortable in another woman's body instead?" Liz asked her.

Rose stopped crying and nodded. She'd never actually been a biological woman before and she really wished she was.

Liz put her hand in her pocket and pulled out an earring. She handed it to Rose. "Put this on when I give the signal," she said before she went down the aisle towards Carly.

"Hi Liz," Carly said with a smile as she saw her friend. She attempted to hug her as best she could while carrying her shopping basket and her handbag.

"Hi Carly," Liz responded.

"We haven't seen you at the salon for a while. You must be overdue for a waxing," Carly said as she glanced at Liz's midsection.

Liz cringed a bit thinking of her hairy nether regions. "Not so loud," she said to her friend quietly, really hoping the rest of the shop didn't hear her friend's loud comment.

Carly laughed cheekily at her friend's embarrassment.

"Actually, as you are here, you could do me a favour," Liz said as she managed to regain a smile.

"Anything for you," the beautician said.

Liz put her hand in her pocket and pulled out the remaining earring. She held it in her fingers to show Carly. "I was wondering what you thought of these?" Liz asked.

Carly took it from her and examined it. "It's pretty although kind of unusual looking," she remarked. She twirled it around her fingers.

"Do you think I could see you wearing it?" Liz asked hopefully.

"Sure," Carly said thinking it was a bit of a strange request. She was still happy to do it for her friend. She removed one of her own earrings. She slipped the magic earring on her ear. "What do you think?" she asked as she twisted her head from side-to-side.

"Hmm, nice but I think I need a second opinion," Liz said. She turned round catching Rose's attention. She nodded several times.

Getting the message, Rose slipped the other earring into her own ear.

Everything in the shop went a little fuzzy. The next thing Rose knew, she was carrying a shopping basket and a handbag. In her open palm, were three earrings. Two of them were the swapping earrings and the third was Carly's.

Rose looked up, she was a little surprised to see Liam's body in front of her. Before she had a chance to react, Liz snatched the magic earrings out her hand. She put them on herself so she was made aware of the swap. Everything briefly went fuzzy again.

Carly now in Liam's body was feeling confused. He took the basket and handbag from Rose. "Thanks for holding on to them for me," Carly said in Liam's voice. She stared at her own face for a second. "Rose isn't it?" She asked. Rose nodded uncertainly, she was a bit confused herself. "Normally, I'd recommend visiting my salon but I don't think you need it," Carly said, complementing her.

Liz wondered if that comment was a bit of residual narcissism from Carly as she watched the two swapped women interact.

Carly turned to face Liz. "They definitely suit you," she said.

"Huh?" Liz asked. She stared at her friend for a second before understanding she was talking about the earrings. "Thanks, I might keep them on," Liz said.

"I better get on with this," Carly said as she pointed at her basket, "Zoe will think I've abandoned her otherwise," she added.

Both Liz and Rose awkwardly smiled as Carly wandered off in Liam's body.

"Feeling better?" Liz asked Rose as she removed the earrings.

Rose looked down at her new breasts. "Yes," she said with glee at having a female body. "I need to go to the toilet though." She didn't really, she was just curious about seeing her new form in the flesh.

"I guess Carly must have had a full bladder when you swapped," Liz said, speculatively as she put the earrings back in her pocket.

"Yes, I guess so," Rose said before she quickly headed off towards the staff toilets in her new heels.

134152.content:
“...stupid bra, always getting in the bloody way...”

Liz sighed as Steven ripped off yet another lacy undergarment and discarded it to the side. They’d both snuck into Elizabeth’s former digs and had torn into the piles of assorted clothing dumped there. Though it’d been relatively easy to pick out a reasonably presentable red polo that was just about large enough to accommodate his new proportions, it was proving nearly impossible to satisfy the bodyswapped assistant supervisor. Each bra was too chafing, each pair of slacks was too tight and each set of footwear was too constricting. Eventually after a handful more painful tries to appease She-Steven, Liz decided to just whip out a skimpy two-piece bikini set that hadn’t sold the previous summer and chucked it Steven’s way, consequences be damned.

“What the hell is this? I’ll look like a bloody whore if anyone sees me!” Steven moaned.

“Oh relax, you big crybaby. No-one’s gonna see it underneath the uniform anyway so why does it matter?! Look, that’s the last item of lingerie that you haven’t chucked back into my face so, like it or lump it, you’re wearing it!” Steven sarcastically mocked Liz’s voice as he slipped the swimsuit on, prompting her to roll her eyes in return. “Whatever,” Liz chuckled sardonically as she watched Steven struggle to pull the polo over his head. As she observed him squirming and writhing she had to resist her urge to cuff him over the back of the head while he was haplessly defenceless. Instead she strode to his side and helped him like a good friend would, struggling to contend with Steven’s constant wriggling but gradually pulling the shirt over his head.

“Thanks,” he mumbled as his cheeks turned rosier. He pushed his glasses back onto the bridge of his nose and yelped as he peeked downwards. No wonder why, the polo that’d seemed to be able to fit beforehand barely made it down to his midriff, making him look like a pale-complexioned Indian belly dancer or just your average English sket. Steven screeched piercingly as he frantically tried to pull the material downwards.

“Oh no, Liz, no way am I wearing this outside of this room!”

Imagine Steven’s face as he watched Liz try (unsuccessfully) to stifle her laughter by covering her mouth in her palms. “C’mon, luv, you’re overreacting,” she squealed between short bursts of laughter. “Honestly, I think it suits you. Anyway, I’m not helping you to put another one on again, you nearly took out my eye the first time! Just take these bottoms I found you and stop complaining!”

Steven grumbled as he took the slacks in his dainty hands and pulled them on. “God, I look like a 70’s Charlie’s Angels reject.” He whined unceremoniously as he twirled in the breezy bellbottomed trousers. “Stop being a drama queen,” Liz taunted as she nearly reached bursting point. To add insult to injury, Emma decided to make her presence known at that very exact moment and she was immediately dumbfounded by Steven’s...interesting clothing ensemble.

“How did...? Why did you...? You know what, never mind. I just came here to hand you this.” Emma passed him a laminated piece of card, his new name tag, and Steven eagerly clipped it on. Liz, ever the eagle eyed supervisor, was the first to notice a slight amendment to the text on the name tag. “Emma, how come it says ‘Stefania’ instead of Steven?”

Emma smacked her forehead as she realised her mistake. “Sorry, luv, must’ve been a typo! I’ll go back and get another one printed out...”

“No,” Steven said in a surprisingly stoic tone. Emma and Liz stopped in their tracks. “I mean, no, it’s fine, Emma. Maybe assuming a new identity is the best thing, at least for now. I don’t want anyone outside this circle knowing about what went on with me. Until we can locate my old body, I guess I can pretend to be ‘Stefania’ for a bit.”

“Quick question: do I still get the salary of an assistant supervisor?”

“Well, yes, but if you’re gonna be working in the store with the others, you might not qualify...”

“Then it’s settled!” Steven skipped out of the room, humming a pleasant little tune to himself while his trouser legs billowed underneath him. Meanwhile Emma and Liz looked to one another, holding off for a second before exploding into raucous laughter. Liz wiped a joyful tear from her eye before presenting the golden earrings in her right palm to Emma. “So what do we do now?” she asked.

“Well...”

1341524.content:
"Let's kill two birds with one stone" Emma said. She looked at her watch. "There is a tea break change over coming up. Take Stefania up to the break room. You can introduce her to two groups of workers. While you are up there you can scope out some potential swap candidates."

"What a great idea." Liz said.

"That's why they pay me the big bucks or they are supposed to at least." Emma said, somewhat dissatisfied with her current salary.

"Could be worse." Liz said.

"Yeah, I could be the manager at the Barnsley store. Poor soul." Liz nodded in agreement.

"What about the rest of the staff? How will they find out about our new assistant supervisor?" Liz asked.

"Just get the workers you talk to, to pass it on that there is a new staff member."

"I probably won't have to, you know the way gossip travels around this place."

---

There was a constant stream of talking and laughter coming from the break room as Liz and Stefania walked down the corridor. Liz went in first, there were a few glances in her direction but the noisy talking continued. When Stefania stepped inside, you could have heard a teaspoon drop.

The men looked dumbstruck. She quickly looked around the room from side to side. Her exaggerated head movement seemed to be in slow motion to her male audience. It gave the impression they were in some sort of shampoo advert. Unconsciously she removed her glasses which just added to the effect.

Her female audience stared silently for different reasons with the possible exception of Allie.

"Everyone if I could have your attention for a moment." Liz said loudly although she didn't have to.

"Is this work related? because we don't get paid for breaks." Asked Michael in a militant mood.

"Yes but I'll be brief. Just remember who pays for your free tea, coffee and fridge when you are on your unpaid break." Liz said, shutting him down. She smiled at everyone. "I want to introduce you to Stefania our new temporary assistant supervisor."

"Has Steve been sacked then?" Asked Aaron. Before getting a response he continued. "No surprise, I can understand why."

Several of the others nodded. "Yeah he was pretty useless." Said Charlotte. Stefania bit her tongue.

"Steven has not been sacked." Liz said loudly, she could see the annoyed look on Stefania's face. "He's been sent on staff training. Stefania is training here before going to another store."

"Which one?" Asked Aaron. Liz hadn't thought of one when she was putting together this hastily concocted cover story.

"Barnsley!" She practically spat out. There was a large amount of sympathetic murmuring throughout the group. "Well I'll let her introduce herself. Stefania took a step forward feeling very self conscious in her new attire.

"Hi everyone. I look forward to working with you." Again most of the men were spellbound by the sweet sounds coming from her mouth.

"You're Polish?" Kiran asked from the far end of the room.

Stefania nodded. "I think so, Kiran." She said.

"Wait, how do you know my name?" She asked.

Stefania started to panic. She'd almost blown it already. "I read it on your name badge." She said proudly, impressed at her own cleverness.

"What, from over there? They must be really good glasses."

---

The break period had barely been over two minutes when Natalie came storming into the manager's office. She nearly caught Emma finishing the pile by putting on her last King. "What's this about Steven being replaced? Shouldn't I be told about this?" An angry Natalie demanded to know.

"Liz was right, word does travel fast." Emma said as she sat upright.

"What?"

"Sorry luv, it was one of those last minute things. I didn't get much notice myself. She just appeared in our office this morning. It caught me and Liz by surprise too." She said honestly.

"Oh well, I see." Said Natalie, calming down a little.

"Have you met the replacement yet?" Natalie shook her head.

"I've heard conflicting stories. Some of the staff were saying she's very beautiful and very friendly. Others said she was rude and standoffish."

"So you've been talking to male and female staff, I'm guessing."

"How did you know?"

"Never mind. Her and Liz will still be in the break room if you want to talk to her yourself."

She considered the idea. It would be a great excuse to be off the shop floor. It was her manager's idea after all. "I might just do that." She was about to turn to head out.

"Before you go luv, tell me what you think of these." Emma said as she pulled out the earrings.

13415242.content:
While Emma slyly persuaded Natalie to try on the earring, Steven was having a difficult time trying to adjust to his new predicament. He’d left the break room temporarily to try and get some work done, leaving Liz to sip her tea on her lonesome. His work wasn’t that hard all things considered—though he still preferred to work down and amongst his colleagues, his role as a supervisor had slashed his workload in half. No, the thing that perturbed him the most were the looks he was receiving from all sides. He’d noticed at least a dozen men glance his way and size him up, many of which had stars in their eyes and one brazen fella even had the nerve to catcall him. He blushed profusely, too embarrassed and too uncomfortable to react to any of them.

The worst culprits by far were his own coworkers. While many of the women stared at him purely for the sake of sizing up their new superior (Allie being the exception; her glances were a lot more lustful than anything else), the men looked at him for one reason and one reason only. And to be fair to them, Steven couldn’t blame them. Heck, had a beautiful Eastern European girl been hired at the store a day before he had little doubt he wouldn’t have been slobbering over her. Steven swore under his breath as he walked into the canned goods aisle. Though the loosely cut bell bottoms provided plenty leeway for his supple legs to move, the skimpy thong underneath them clung to him tighter than stink on rice. He grumbled as he slipped his dainty hand inside to try and readjust it’s position, rummaging around whilst his other hand reached high to place a can of baked beans onto the top shelf.

There seemed to be no suitable placement though and after a few dozen seconds without success Steven grew frustrated. A customer looking for some canned peas strode into the aisle but soon strolled right back out, seeing a very out of context scene indeed. Steven meanwhile was still going ham on the bikini thong, using both hands now to pull the restrictive material out from his buttcrack. Fortunately or unfortunately, depending on the reader’s perspective of the ensuing incident, Steven’s hand somehow slipped as it moved through and his manicured fingers brushed against the edge of his clit, sending a fuzzy vibration coursing through his body from the soles of his feet to the crown of his head.

“Uh...” Steven moaned slightly. Wow. Is that what female arousal felt like? Steven swivelled his head from side to side to make sure no one was watching him. Although he wanted to try and experience that feeling again, he didn’t want to be caught by a customer, or even worse, a coworker, and have to try and explain his way out of an awkward moment. Curiosity beat out caution and Steven was mere moments from trickling his fingers back inside his front when he heard a light cough over his shoulder. He reacted poorly to the surprise, stumbling in the heeled ballet flats Liz had lent to him, and would’ve fallen to the ground had the stranger not caught him in their arms.

“Woah, sorry there,” their familiar voice said as they levered Steven back upright. It turned out that the person was no stranger but was actually Luis. The Dominican born man watched silently as Steven brushed himself off and adjusted his glasses back into place.

“So sorry if I startled you, chica,” he said in an easygoing Dominican tone. “Sorry, I meant to say ‘ma’am’. Excuse my informality, Miss...”

“Stefania. Just Stefania.” Steven held out his hand to shake but Luis instead kissed it, eliciting a shy blush and a nervous giggle from him. “And there’s no need to call me ‘Miss’ or anything like that. Think of me as just another coworker who’s covering for the assistant supervisor until he comes back.”

Hopefully soon, he grumbled internally.

Luis chuckled. “How can I think of a sweet little jévon like you as just another coworker?” Steven blushed again and cursed himself for it. Why did this body get so flustered at every single ambiguous example of flirtation? Luis noticed ‘Stefania’’s rosy cheeks and grinned partially. “Sorry about that, we Dominicans are natural flirts. Can’t help myself. Anyways, I just came over ‘cause I saw you struggling to put that can on the shelf. Here, let me help.” Steven silently passed it over and watched as Luis stretched up and positioned effortlessly. Steven couldn’t help but observe Luis’ athletic figure ripple underneath the standard red polo, his tanned biceps straining the seams. Steven didn’t even blame his new form for admiring Luis—no homo but that dude was built like an Olympic cyclist.

“There you go, Miss Stefania. Holler at me if you need anything else, y’hear?” Steven nodded and thanked Luis as he stepped out of the aisle. He breathed a huge sigh of relief knowing Luis hadn’t seen anything. He still had the urge to experiment with his new equipment but seeing as how close he’d got to getting busted before he didn’t think it was the wisest idea yet.

For now at least he’d try to keep his head down and stay out of people’s way as much as possible. He pulled the thong out once more and moved onto the next task set for him.

"At least meet Tony, talk to him. He's part of this too, Molly as well." Claire got the distinct impression she was getting railroaded. She slowly nodded.

"I'm not promising anything." Kelly kissed her on the lips. "When do you want to meet up?"

"Tonight?" Kelly asked hopefully. "Come round my place and you can meet everyone." This was all moving very fast for Claire. She did like Kelly and the idea did sound somewhat intriguing.

Kelly gave Claire her address. The two of them exchanged phone numbers. Kelly looked at her watch. "Oh, crap! We've been in here ages." She pointed at the supply room door. "We better get back to work."

Meanwhile...

Liz 2 fastened the top button of her blouse. Finished dressing she turned around to head out of the bedroom.

As she spun round, she saw a somewhat angry looking Carly. She was still wrapped in just a towel, looking adorable in Liz 2's eyes. Carly had armed herself with a metal egg whisk. Liz 2 could see she was physically shaking. In her work shoes, Liz 2 was now considerably taller than Carly and as she walked up to her she was aware her height was probably intimating to the shorter blonde woman, so she stopped. Carly was blocking the door anyway. "Who the hell are you?" Carly demanded to know.

"Eh, it's me, Liz, obviously, are you feeling all right?" Liz 2 didn't know what was going on but she tried to her bluff her way out.

"Liar! I should have seen it last night, I would have, if I hadn't been so drunk." Carly cursed herself. "Liz can't speak Spanish, Liz can't use chopsticks, Liz doesn't have a bladder like a horse, Liz gets hangovers and Liz wouldn't have slept with me!" Liz 2 slumped her shoulders. This little fantasy was over.

"You are right." She admitted. "I should go." She tried to move forward a little. Carly was unyielding.

"What are you talking about?" Carly asked as she raised up the whisk.

"For all my good intentions, I seem to leave a trail of misery behind me. You would be better off without me." Carly looked insulted.

"Seriously, I have the best sex of my life and you expect me to just let you walk away. Surely, you know me better than that." Liz 2 did. "You seem to know everything else about me."

"Yes, I've betrayed your trust. I used Liz's knowledge to my own advantage." She told her.

"Now we are getting somewhere. I know you aren't Liz's twin. So who are you?"

"You've spoken to Liz?" It was obvious to Liz 2 why Carly had changed her behaviour suddenly. She knew it had been a mistake using Carly's own phone to message her original. If she hadn't been so drunk herself, she would not have made that error. It was also clear Liz hadn't told Carly who Liz 2 was. In Carly's eyes she was a complete stranger. No wonder she's terrified, Liz 2 thought.

Carly nodded. "I don't pretend to understand how Liz has some sort of doppelganger wandering around but I'd like you to tell me."

"You won't believe me." Liz 2 warned.

"Try me."

"I'm an advanced biological construct based on your friend Liz." Liz 2 admitted. Her internal directives were screaming in her head not to share this information but she wanted to tell Carly. In a way she felt relieved, she could actually talk about herself. Carly seemed to mull this new information over for a while.

"So were you grown in a lab or something?" The hand carrying the whisk dropped as Carly let her guard down.

"No, there is a device from a future time, at Liz's work. Several days ago, she used it, not understanding what it was and it made me." Carly couldn't understand part of what Liz 2 was telling her so she dismissed that for now. She accepted that Liz 2 was created by a machine, that was good enough for now.

"So you are a copy of her?" Carly asked.

"Kind of. I have all her memories and emotions."

"What do you mean 'kind of'?"

"I'm enhanced. Liz desired to be better at Spanish, so I am fluent in Spanish. Liz desired to be able to use chopsticks, so I can use chopsticks." She explained. Much to her surprise Carly laughed.

"God, she must hate your guts." Liz 2 was confused.

"I exist to make her life easier. I can do the things she is unwilling or unable to do herself." Liz 2 said parroting her manufacturer's spiel. Carly's eyes opened wide.

"You don't know her as well as you think you do." Liz 2 still looked confused. Carly had a point. If you see the world through one set of eyes, you'll never truly understand how others feel about you. Liz 2 assumed Carly meant her own behaviour towards Liz.

"I am compelled to be considerate of her feelings. For example, I am not permitted to have sex without informing her." It became immediately clear to Carly why she sent those messages to Liz.

"Who made those stupid rules up?" Carly asked.

"Liz." Carly laughed again. "I had almost total free will to begin with. Directives should be set when I am first created but Liz...," it took an extreme effort on Liz 2 to say the next part,"messed up. She realised it was causing undesirable behaviour and she corrected it."

"Corrected it? Sounds like brainwashing to me. What else did she tell you to do?" Carly asked.

"Told me to be a good wife and mother."

"Surely, if you have those feelings then your emotions would make that happen anyway."

"She didn't remove my feelings for Eric or Ethan. It was a little redundant, yes."

"She was going to remove your emotions?" A shocked Carly asked.

"She was considering it but she allowed me to keep them."

"Oh how generous of her." Carly said sarcastically. Liz 2 wanted to tell her more.

"Actually, it feels really wrong talking about this but after she threw me out yesterday. I had feelings of loneliness and animosity towards my original."

"Why did she throw you out?"

"I made a big mistake, which I compounded by making several further mistakes. I attempted to apologise but she rejected me and told me to leave."

"She threw you out, on to the street?" Liz 2 nodded. "Okay this is important. Did Liz find out about your mistakes or did you tell her first?"

"I told her before she found out."

"So she punished you for being honest?"

"I suppose she did, yes" Carly couldn't help but feel that Liz 2 was a collection of contradictions. She had Liz's memories and feelings, yet she was also different than Liz with all her enhancements. Her freedom was governed by the restrictions put in place by the directives. Fundamentally though, underneath it all there was a somewhat childlike innocence. She was a brand new person and had a lack of genuine experience to fall back on.

Carly wrapped her arms round her. "You must feel really messed up inside."

"I do, yes." It was a moment of clarity for Liz 2. Her thoughts and feelings were all going in multiple directions. "Now Liz knows what I've done, she's probably on her way here. She'll be feeling very angry towards me, again." Carly leaned back a little so Liz 2 could see her face.

"I guessed as much. It'll be different this time."

"How will it be different?"

"She'll have to get through me first!" A determined Carly told her.

It had been a strange morning for Steven. Before they had even opened, Emma had appeared with a sexy new look. She had high hopes he'd be a good assistant to her. He really wanted to meet her expectations but her walking around in that short skirt made her very distracting.

Things had been quiet for a while, relatively speaking. The shop was usually at its busiest on a Saturday. He ended up panicking a bit when Emma had called him to the office and he needed to find Kelly to watch the floor. He'd spent quite a while looking for her. Her and Claire seemed to have disappeared of the face of the Earth.

Just as suddenly as they had disappeared, they reappeared. Both of them had just walked out the warehouse when he spotted them. Kelly looked a little embarrassed when he asked her where she'd been. She claimed to have been checking something in the warehouse with Claire. Steven felt she wasn't being truthful, as he had checked the whole area several times. The only place he didn't check was the supply room but it was locked when he tried the door. Only the managers, Natalie and John the janitor had a key.

Now she had been found, he was finally making his way towards the office. He knocked on the door. "Just a minute." Emma called. She opened it for him and he stepped inside.

Emma walked back to her chair as Steven shut the door. He noticed there was a pile of random looking objects on her desk. He ignored them for the moment as Emma pointed to Liz's desk. He looked at it nervously. "Time to sit in the big chair." Emma said.

"Err, yeah." He said as he sat down and turned on the computer.

"I was expecting you earlier." She said, sounding a little disappointed.

"I had a few issues downstairs." Emma leaned over, looking a little concerned. "Nothing major." She leaned back in her chair.

"Wasn't Kelly there to help?" She asked.

"That was one of the issues, I couldn't locate her. I did eventually." Emma was a little surprised by that. She was usually fairly reliable. Steven signed into the computer.

"Does your log-in give you access to the company e-mail?" Steven checked.

"Everything apart from the ones marked 'Manager Only'." Emma smiled.

"Thank God for that. I don't have time to deal with all of that nonsense. Liz usually handles it." Steven started reading them. Most of them were in fact nonsense. His reading was interrupted with two tiny thuds. He looked up.

Emma had put her feet up on the desk and appeared to be filing her nails as she leaned back in her chair. Steven had never seen her act so casually in here before. He was surprised she had her feet up, considering the short skirt too. He couldn't see much for her tights as he tried not actively not look in his manager's direction.

He noticed the list of unread emails marked 'Manager Only' was getting quite lengthy. "There are quite a few e-mails for you too Emma." He said trying to be informative but he was a little worried by her possible negative reaction.

"Oh, I'll check them later luv." Emma said as she stared off into space. She was thinking about what she was going to do to Kyle later or if she couldn't wait that long, possibly someone from the shop.

While waiting for the screen to refresh, Steven glanced over his work area. "There is a large stain on this desk." He said.

"Is there?" Emma asked innocently. "I never noticed that before. There must have been a spillage." She knew fine well how it had got there. "We'll need to have John take a look at it."

"He's busy unclogging the toilets." Steven said.

"When it is a bit quieter, later we can try one of those wonderful cleaning products we sell, on it."

"Do you want me to do it?" He asked, a little annoyed by the presence of the stain.

"No, no. You are in charge today. We can have one of the girls come up," her attention wandered a little, "and give it a good," she paused, "wipe down." She said slowly.

"Right." He said, wondering what she was thinking about.

"Actually, I think I might have an early lunch." Steven looked at his watch. It had just gone ten o'clock. "Not right now, I'll do my rounds first." She lied. She glanced at her feet. "There is something I really want to buy today."

Steven started to panic. "Are you sure about leaving me in charge?" Emma put her feet down and stood up. She picked up her handbag and walked past the front of Liz's desk.

"I have every confidence in you." She said as she gently touched his shoulder. "Don't worry, enjoy the perks. Like our executive bathroom." She pointed at the toilet door. The old paint was peeling off it.

Before he knew it she was gone.

---

Ninety minutes later Emma returned to the store. She carefully walked inside, she had been feeling a little dissatisfied with her height recently, so had purchased a new pair of shoes while she was out. She was now perched on a pair of black six inch heels. Thankfully, for her ankles there was a platform under the toes.

As she had tried them on in the shop, she had thought they had done wonders for her legs as well as her height. She was now taller than nearly all the women and some of the men in the shop. She knew the shoes would help with those feelings of power she craved.

She took the opportunity to strut around the shop floor making sure everyone got a good look before she headed back to the office. She loved how she now almost towered over some of the female members of staff. It made her cock stiff in her knickers and the pheromones poured out of her. Every woman turned their head to look at her and she loved it.

When she had finally had enough, she headed back to the office, taking great care when climbing the stairs.

---

Emma unlocked the office door and walked in. Much to her surprise there was an embarrassed looking woman she didn't recognise sitting in Liz's chair. She had on a Wilko uniform and she had what looked like a remote control in her hand. Before Emma could say anything the woman spoke.

"Emma, you've got to help me. I'm stuck!" She said, sounding very worried.
